# Awesome n8n Templates
> https://scrapernode.github.io/awesome-n8n-templates

## About
The largest open-source collection of n8n workflow templates on GitHub.
8,697+ ready-to-import automation workflows across 25 categories.
Built by ScraperNode (https://useweld.com) — web scraping made simple for n8n.

## ScraperNode
ScraperNode is a community node for n8n that scrapes LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and more.
Install: npm package `n8n-nodes-scrapernode`
Guide: https://scrapernode.github.io/awesome-n8n-templates/docs/scrapernode-guide

## Categories
- AI & LLMs: https://scrapernode.github.io/awesome-n8n-templates/templates/ai-and-llm/
- AI Chatbots: https://scrapernode.github.io/awesome-n8n-templates/templates/ai-chatbots/
- AI RAG: https://scrapernode.github.io/awesome-n8n-templates/templates/ai-rag/
- AI Tools: https://scrapernode.github.io/awesome-n8n-templates/templates/ai-tools/
- Content Creation: https://scrapernode.github.io/awesome-n8n-templates/templates/content-creation/
- CRM: https://scrapernode.github.io/awesome-n8n-templates/templates/crm/
- Crypto Trading: https://scrapernode.github.io/awesome-n8n-templates/templates/crypto-trading/
- DevOps: https://scrapernode.github.io/awesome-n8n-templates/templates/devops/
- Engineering: https://scrapernode.github.io/awesome-n8n-templates/templates/engineering/
- Lead Generation: https://scrapernode.github.io/awesome-n8n-templates/templates/lead-generation/
- Lead Nurturing: https://scrapernode.github.io/awesome-n8n-templates/templates/lead-nurturing/
- Personal Productivity: https://scrapernode.github.io/awesome-n8n-templates/templates/personal-productivity/
- Social Media: https://scrapernode.github.io/awesome-n8n-templates/templates/social-media/
- Web Scraping: https://scrapernode.github.io/awesome-n8n-templates/use-cases/web-scraping/
